Allow: /

Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/

# Dynamic sitemap (auto-generated from database — always fresh)

# Static sitemap (core pages)
Sitemap: https://syrabit.ai/sitemap.xml

# Crawl-delay for polite crawling
